interfaces.name: getHomeOverview
interfaces.description: Get aggregated content for the home page, including summaries and featured items.

interfaces.name: getCourseFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for the Online Courses listing page.

interfaces.name: searchCourses
interfaces.description: Search and filter online courses for the listing page.

onlyActive.description: If true, only return courses with status 'active'

interfaces.name: getCourseDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific online course for the course detail page.

parameters.name: courseId
parameters.description: ID of the course (from URL parameter)

interfaces.name: addCourseToCart
interfaces.description: Add a course to the single-user shopping cart, creating the cart if it does not exist.

parameters.name: courseId
parameters.description: ID of the Course to add

interfaces.name: getCartDetails
interfaces.description: Get current cart contents and totals for the Cart page.

interfaces.name: updateCartItemQuantity
interfaces.description: Update the quantity of a specific cart item. Quantity 0 will remove the item.

interfaces.name: removeCartItem
interfaces.description: Remove a specific item from the cart.

interfaces.name: getConsultingPackageFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for the Consulting Services & Packages page.

interfaces.name: searchConsultingPackages
interfaces.description: Search and filter consulting packages for the Consulting Services & Packages page.

onlyActive.description: If true, only return packages with status 'active'

interfaces.name: getConsultingPackageDetails
interfaces.description: Get details for a specific consulting package for the package detail page.

interfaces.name: getProposalContext
interfaces.description: Get a summary of the selected consulting package or custom training configuration for the Proposal Request page.

parameters.name: consultingPackageId
parameters.description: Required when sourceType is 'consulting_package'. ID comes from URL parameter.

parameters.name: customTrainingConfigurationId
parameters.description: Required when sourceType is 'custom_training_configuration'. ID comes from URL parameter.

interfaces.name: submitProposalRequest
interfaces.description: Submit a proposal or quote request for a consulting package or custom training configuration.

parameters.name: preferredStartDate
parameters.description: ISO 8601 datetime string representing preferred project start date

interfaces.name: getWorkshopFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for the Workshops & Programs page.

interfaces.name: searchWorkshops
interfaces.description: Search and filter workshops for the Workshops & Programs page.

onlyActive.description: If true, only return workshops with status 'active'

interfaces.name: getWorkshopDetails
interfaces.description: Get detailed information for a specific workshop.

interfaces.name: addWorkshopToTrainingPlan
interfaces.description: Save a workshop to the single-user Training Plan.

parameters.name: workshopId
parameters.description: Workshop ID from the current workshop detail page

interfaces.name: getTrainingPlan
interfaces.description: Get the current Training Plan with saved workshops for the My Training Plan page.

interfaces.name: updateTrainingPlanItem
interfaces.description: Update priority or notes for a training plan item.

interfaces.name: removeTrainingPlanItem
interfaces.description: Remove a workshop from the Training Plan.

interfaces.name: exportTrainingPlan
interfaces.description: Generate a summary of the training plan for export, print, or email.

interfaces.name: getBookingServices
interfaces.description: Get list of active services for the Booking page service dropdown.

interfaces.name: getServiceDurations
interfaces.description: Get available session durations (in minutes) for a specific booking service.

interfaces.name: getAvailabilitySlots
interfaces.description: Get available time slots for a service in a given week, optionally filtered by time of day.

parameters.name: weekStartDate
parameters.description: ISO 8601 date string for the first day of the desired week

interfaces.name: createBooking
interfaces.description: Create a booking for a selected time slot and service on the Booking page.

interfaces.name: getCaseStudyFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for the Case Studies page.

interfaces.name: searchCaseStudies
interfaces.description: Search and filter case studies for the Case Studies page.

onlyPublished.description: If true, only return case studies with status 'published'

interfaces.name: getCaseStudyDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific case study.

interfaces.name: saveCaseStudy
interfaces.description: Save a case study to the single-user Saved Items list.

parameters.name: caseStudyId
parameters.description: ID of the case study being saved

interfaces.name: getSavedItems
interfaces.description: Get all saved items (currently focused on case studies) for the Saved Items page.

interfaces.name: removeSavedItem
interfaces.description: Remove an item from the Saved Items list.

interfaces.name: getArticleFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get search and filter options for the Insights / Blog page.

interfaces.name: searchArticles
interfaces.description: Search and filter blog articles for the Insights / Blog page.

onlyPublished.description: If true, only return articles with status 'published'

interfaces.name: getArticleDetails
interfaces.description: Get full content for a specific article, including any metadata needed for display.

interfaces.name: createNewsletterSubscription
interfaces.description: Submit the embedded newsletter signup form, including topics and frequency.

parameters.name: articleId
parameters.description: If subscription originates from an article page

interfaces.name: getPricingOverview
interfaces.description: Get standard pricing tiers and example packages for the Pricing & Calculator page.

interfaces.name: getCurrentCustomTrainingConfiguration
interfaces.description: Get the current custom training configuration and its latest estimate for the Pricing calculator.

interfaces.name: updateCustomTrainingConfiguration
interfaces.description: Update the custom training configuration and recalculate the estimated total.

parameters.name: budgetLimit
parameters.description: Optional budget ceiling used to compute 'is_under_budget'

interfaces.name: getConsultantFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for the Consultants & Experts directory.

interfaces.name: searchConsultants
interfaces.description: Search and filter consultants for the Consultants & Experts page.

onlyActive.description: If true, only return consultants with status 'active'

interfaces.name: getConsultantDetails
interfaces.description: Get full profile information for a specific consultant.

interfaces.name: submitConsultantContactRequest
interfaces.description: Submit an inquiry from a consultant’s profile contact form.

parameters.name: consultantId
parameters.description: Consultant ID from the profile URL

interfaces.name: getAboutPageContent
interfaces.description: Get structured content for the About page: mission, values, leadership team, and impact metrics.

interfaces.name: getContactPageContent
interfaces.description: Get static contact details and guidance for the Contact page.

interfaces.name: submitContactForm
interfaces.description: Submit the general-purpose contact form from the Contact page.

interfaces.name: getLegalContent
interfaces.description: Get content for Privacy Policy or Terms of Service pages.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateCart
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to get or create the single-user Cart in storage.

helperFunctions.name: _recalculateCartTotals
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to compute subtotal, discounts, tax, and total for the current cart.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateTrainingPlan
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to get or create the single-user TrainingPlan.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateCustomTrainingConfiguration
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to get or initialize the CustomTrainingConfiguration for the pricing calculator.

helperFunctions.name: _calculateTrainingEstimateFromSettings
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper that uses PricingCalculatorSettings to compute estimated_total and is_under_budget for a CustomTrainingConfiguration.

helperFunctions.name: _lockAndMarkSlotAsBooked
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to atomically mark an AvailabilitySlot as booked when creating a Booking.
